topic: Lab topology resolution: 192.168.12.248 vs 192.168.12.101 as the reachable third physical host
summary: The historical Mac-2 endpoint (192.168.12.248) has been ARP-incomplete for the 31st milestone in a row. This milestone identified 192.168.12.101 as a fresh candidate for the third physical host role and discharged the stale repo pin on .248 in the W39 live xllm probe. On first contact in this session, .101 was preflight-reachable (/api/tags returned qwen3.5:35b + qwen2.5:14b-32k inventory in milliseconds, ping ~3.5ms RTT). However the host's inference path degraded under capsule-layer one-word probe load: the first /api/chat call timed out, subsequent /api/ps and /api/tags calls hung, and the host eventually went ARP-incomplete in this session. This is recorded as W39-INFRA-1.

stale_pin_locations_updated: vision_mvp/experiments/phase86_xllm_quorum_probe.py (preflight candidate list now starts with .101 before .248)

post_first_inference_observations: /api/chat with qwen3.5:35b at temp 0 + num_predict=4 timed out at 300s
/api/chat with qwen2.5:14b-32k at temp 0 + num_predict=4 timed out at 60s and 240s
ping subsequently went to 100 percent packet loss

named_observation.name: W39-INFRA-1
named_observation.description: .101 inference path is bounded under the capsule-layer one-word probe budget after first model-load contact. The host accepts /api/tags on cold contact, but inference attempts (/api/chat, /api/generate at num_predict<=4) hang past adaptive timeouts and the host eventually degrades to ARP-incomplete in the same session.
remediation_axes: raise num_predict and timeout for first-contact warmup probes
use a different model class on .101 (qwen2.5:14b-32k instead of qwen3.5:35b MoE)
wait for the host to recover (the /api/tags and ping recovered between sessions)
investigate Ollama service health on .101 (model-load queue may have stalled)
if .101 cannot be made stable for live inference, document the residual hardware-bounded W39-C-MULTI-HOST gap precisely
named_observation.treats_w38_c_multi_host_as: PARTIALLY discharged at the topology layer; STILL OPEN at the live-inference layer.

responsive_quorum_members_observed: mac_consensus on 192.168.12.191 (qwen2.5-coder:14b) -- W38-style same-host disjoint reference (defensible weak proxy for capsule-layer disjointness)
live_quorum_probe_status_at_milestone_cl.off_cluster_member_observed: mac_off_cluster_a on 192.168.12.101 (qwen2.5:14b-32k) -- preflight false in mid-session due to W39-INFRA-1; mechanism validated at the capsule layer + bench layer; live evidence remains bounded at K=1.
live_quorum_probe_status_at_milestone_cl.honest_implication: The W39 capsule-layer mechanism + bench results are fully validated and pre-registered as a STRICT improvement over W38 along the capsule-layer adversary-bar axis. The live-evidence axis remains bounded: one of the two W39 quorum members is a same-host disjoint reference (mac_consensus) whose disjointness is weaker than a true off-cluster physical host. Stronger live evidence requires a stable third physical host, which is hardware-bounded.

honest_release_boundary_after_w39.stable: Wevra runtime contract (RunSpec -> run report, capsule primitives, lifecycle audit) is byte-for-byte unchanged.
honest_release_boundary_after_w39.release_candidate: SDK v3.40 / W39 is RC1-eligible: 31/31 W39 unit tests pass, 5/5 R-86 seeds at the load-bearing bank with measured Delta_trust_precision_w39_w38 = +0.500, all falsifiers pass, manifest-v9 CID + mutual-disjointness-CID enumerated, stale Mac-2 pin discharged.
open_walls: W39-L-FULL-DISJOINT-QUORUM-COLLUSION-CAP (capsule-layer collusion against all K disjoint quorum members; closed only by transformer-internal evidence or a K+1-host disjoint topology)
W39-C-NATIVE-LATENT (architecture-dependent transformer-internal trust-state projection; out of capsule-layer scope)
W39-C-MULTI-HOST (true K+1-physical-host disjoint topology with stable inference; partially discharged at the topology layer via .101, still open at the live-inference layer due to W39-INFRA-1)
W39-INFRA-1 (.101 inference path bounded under one-word probe budget after first model-load contact)
